title: Khara tweet about an even earlier version of the ending
display_title: Khara tweet about an even earlier version of the ending
wikitext:
[]: Khara tweet about an even earlier version of the ending             Quote Post by Ranlux » Fri Mar 13, 2026 8:20 pm Saw a Japanese speaking anon on 4chan make this post: https://desuarchive.org/a/thread/286610482/#286621496 and he's talking about this tweet https://x.com/khara_inc2/status/1983413910024925503/photo/1 with this photo: I'd say it warrants some discussion, especially with the stuff relating to Gendo and how that relates to concurrency arguments, or how it informs on One More Final's interpretation. Last A and Last B are already mentioned in the wiki page on the interpretation of OMF after all.

[]: Re: Khara tweet about an even earlier version of the ending             Quote Post by Ranlux » Fri Mar 13, 2026 8:31 pm Here's the Japanese text: 「もういいんだ、母さん。父さんの所にいってあげてよ」 「エヴァと共にいれば、永遠を生きられるのに」 「でも、誰もいない」 みんなの墓を立てているシンジ。 「みんなもどこかで生きてるかも、知れないのに」 「いや、もう会えないよ」 「しがみつきたいのは、一人で十分だ」 アスカと二人っきりのシンジ。 壊してある、アスカの墓。 [REDACTED] 「まだ、生きてる。だから生きてくさ」 「生きなさいよ。一人で死んだら、絶対、許さないから」 アスカの首を、無表情に黙ってしめる、シンジ。 抵抗しないアスカ。 何も云わずに、シンジの頬をなでる。 泣き出すシンジ。 「あんたなんかに殺されるのは、まっぴらよ」

[]: Re: Khara tweet about an even earlier version of the ending             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Mar 14, 2026 3:46 am Machine translation gives me: “It's okay now, Mom. Go be with Dad.” “If you were with Eva, you could live forever.” “But there's no one there.” Shinji is building graves for everyone. “Maybe everyone is still alive somewhere.” “No, I can’t see them anymore.” “One person clinging on is enough.” Shinji, alone with Asuka. Asuka’s grave, now destroyed. [REDACTED] “I'm still alive. So I'm going to keep living.” “You have to live. If you die alone, I'll never forgive you.” Shinji silently and expressionlessly wraps his arms around Asuka's neck. Asuka offers no resistance. Without saying a word, she strokes Shinji's cheek. Shinji begins to cry. “I have absolutely no interest in being killed by someone like you.”

Shinji begins to cry. “I have absolutely no interest in being killed by someone like you.”
